rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PETER MON YU HUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/02/2021 (no earlier date available). 1) No courtesy copies of the two supplements and other supporting documents have been received. Please mail them to Room 202 (or use a drop box outside Room 103). 2) Exhibits filed on 12/29/2020 were not authenticated and verified by the petitioner. 3) The verification attached to the second supplement refers to the report on the status of administration instead of the second supplement. 4) Please identify Kwai Jone Hung's date of death. 5) According to Hong Chew's affidavit filed on 11/10/2020, Kwai Jone Hung's disclaimer was delivered to the petitioner as personal representative within 9 months after the decedent's death, but the petitioner was not appointed until after the 9-month period. 6) Please provide a specific description of property proposed to be distributed to the beneficiary. CRC 7.651. The proposed order refers to cash, but the only property listed on the inventory and appraisal is the decedent's LLC interest.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SERGE JOHN WHITE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 02/09/2021. The following issues remain unaddressed: 1) Notice of the hearing must be on the most recent version of a mandatory Judicial Council form DE-120 including a statement in bold face type required by Probate Code section 12201(b). 2) Direct notice must be given to the personal representative of the surviving spouse's estate. 3) Copies of the report and all supplements must be given to Inheritance Funding Company. 4) Notice with copies of the report and all supplements must be given to Marc Seidenfeld as no waiver of notice or withdrawal of his request for special notice has been filed. 5) Paragraph 6 of the report alleges that the petitioner's share of the estate is 16.665%, but according to the 08/12/2020 order, the petitioner will not receive any final distribution. 6) Paragraph 7 of the report must include all information required by CRC 7.250(a). 7) Paragraph 12 of the report alleges that all creditor claims have been paid or settled, but no DE-174 form is on file except for the petitioner's rejection of American Express Centurion Bank's claim. 8) No receipts for preliminary distribution have been filed. 9) No election by the personal representative of the surviving spouse's estate is on file. Probate Code section 13502. Is the personal representative of the surviving spouse's estate contemplating a spousal property petition?

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF GERTHA R CURTIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues may include (but not limited to): 1) Various life insurance policies with cash values have never been inventoried and appraised. None of the policies have been reported as assets of the conservatorship in the former conservator's accounts. The former conservator and current conservator are not bonded for the known cash values of the policies. 2) The former conservator's counsel is requesting fees of $10,160. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall. Please review the Court's 8th Amended General Order which took effect on 12/07/2020 for more information.

The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box.
